query: SELECT e.id, e.name, COALESCE(e.email, 'NULL') as est_email, COALESCE(u.email, 'NULL') as user_email, e.userId FROM establishments e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.userId = u.id WHERE e.name LIKE '%Big%' OR e.name LIKE '%Lanche%' OR e.name LIKE '%roxe%' OR e.name LIKE '%Roxe%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT e.id, e.name, COALESCE(e.email, 'NULL') as est_email, COALESCE(u.email, 'NULL') as user_email, e.userId FROM establishments e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.userId = u.id WHERE e.name LIKE '%Big%' OR e.name LIKE '%Lanche%' OR e.name LIKE '%roxe%' OR e.name LIKE '%Roxe%'
